common_questions.question: How long does it take to see results?
common_questions.answer: Most clients see the automations running within the first week. Measurable business results (leads, time saved, revenue) typically show up within 2-4 weeks of the system going live.

common_questions.question: Do I need to be technical to use what you build?
common_questions.answer: No. I build everything with non-technical people in mind. Every delivery includes a video walkthrough and written guide. If something breaks, you message me and I fix it.

common_questions.question: What tools do you use?
common_questions.answer: For automation: n8n, Zapier, Make.com. For AI: OpenAI (ChatGPT), Anthropic (Claude). For LinkedIn: Phantombuster or Waalaxy. For CRM: HubSpot, Airtable, Salesforce. I work with whatever you already have.

common_questions.question: Can you guarantee results?
common_questions.answer: Yes. If the agreed deliverables aren't working correctly at handoff, I fix it at no additional cost. Simple as that.

common_questions.question: What if I need changes after delivery?
common_questions.answer: All packages include a support period (14-30 days). After that, you can either add a monthly retainer or I'll quote any changes as a quick one-off job.

case_studies.challenge: Spending 15+ hours/week manually finding and messaging LinkedIn prospects
case_studies.solution: LinkedIn outreach automation with AI-personalised messages — fully hands-off system

case_studies.challenge: Content bottleneck — manually writing social posts for 8 clients
case_studies.solution: AI content system generating and scheduling posts automatically across all platforms
results: Took on 6 new clients at full margin

case_studies.challenge: Customer support was eating the entire team's time
case_studies.solution: AI chatbot trained on product catalogue and FAQs, with human handoff for complex issues

pricing_objections.response: Totally fair point. Let me break it down: if this automation saves you {hours_saved} hours a week, at even $30/hour that's ${monthly_value}/month in time back. The package pays for itself in {payback_months} months and then it's pure profit every month after. Does that framing change things?

pricing_objections.objection: I need to think about it
pricing_objections.response: Of course. What's the main thing you're unsure about — the investment, whether it'll work for your specific situation, or something else? I'd rather address it now than have you sit on it.

ChatGPT is great — I use it too. The difference is I connect it into your actual systems so it runs automatically. You don't have to log in, copy-paste, or remember to use it. It just works in the background while you do other things.

pricing_objections.objection: I've tried automation before and it didn't work
pricing_objections.response: That's actually the most common reason people come to me. Usually it's either the wrong tool, poor setup, or it wasn't maintained. I'd love to hear what you tried — I can tell you quickly whether what I build would be different and how.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.text: Elliot set up our LinkedIn automation and within 3 weeks we had more qualified calls than we'd had the entire previous quarter. Genuinely impressive.

testimonials.name: Priya N.
testimonials.text: The content automation system Elliot built us runs every single day without anyone touching it. We've taken on 6 new clients because of the time we freed up.

testimonials.name: James K.
testimonials.text: Our chatbot handles 70% of customer questions now. Our support team went from drowning to actually having time to work on growth.
